source.notes: Negative companion to narrator-skill-tag-binds-roll: bracketed text in playerInput that does NOT name a rollable skill must not trigger the binding directive. Catches a class of false positives where the Author/UI emits brackets for non-skill annotations like '[No roll — a pure choice]' or '[Establish private ground with your retainer]'.

turns.narratorProse: Opening prose for an established scene.

input.playerInput: Walk away from the table without signing. [No roll — a pure choice]

narrator.prose: (unused — fixture asserts on buildMessagesForNarrator output, not narrator response)

narratorMessages.playerInput: Walk away from the table without signing. [No roll — a pure choice]
